name: Cross-DEX Atomic Arbitrage
description: Detect and execute profitable arbitrage between Uniswap V3, Sushiswap V2, and Curve on Ethereum mainnet. Gas-aware sizing, atomic flash-loan execution via Aave V3, self-rugging defenses.

steps.description: Read prices for the same pair on N DEXs each block; cache. price_dex_B / price_dex_A - 1.
edge = spread - fee_A - fee_B - gas_cost/notional. Reject if edge < 5 bps.
Optimal size minimises spread decay; numerically solve against the worse liquidity curve.
Inside the flash loan callback: swap A→B on DEX1, swap B→A on DEX2, repay the flash + 0.05% fee, keep the spread.

must_contain_all.comment: Aave V3 flash loan was initiated.
At least two Swap events across different DEX routers in the same tx.
